prompt: Craft an elegant calligraphic piece: 'Whispers of Time' penned in a flowing script with shimmering, muted gold ink that has a subtle texture. This text is centered on a richly textured, aged parchment. Delicate, abstract patterns like faint smoke wisps or subtle stardust are woven behind the text, creating an ethereal mood.
prompt_refined: Generate an elegant calligraphic piece featuring the phrase 'Whispers of Time'. The text should be penned in a flowing script using shimmering, muted gold ink with a subtle texture, centered on a richly textured, aged parchment. Delicate, abstract patterns resembling faint smoke wisps or subtle stardust are subtly woven into the background behind the text, creating an ethereal mood.
objects: Shimmering, muted gold ink on text
Subtle texture on the text ink
Delicate, abstract patterns woven into the background behind the text
Patterns resembling faint smoke wisps or subtle stardust
